title: bstack closure-contract arcs v1
description: Schema for .control/arcs.yaml — declarative user-defined control arcs. Each arc is a (X, U, h, Π, T) 5-tuple lifted from the 4 hard-coded RCS layers in rcs-parameters.toml.template to N user-declared domain arcs. The agent's reasoning is the universal controller (Π); when actuator.kind == 'agent_reasoning' the controller binding is implicit. Read by scripts/compute-arc-status.sh and scripts/doctor.sh §20.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump to 2 on breaking changes; a new schemas/arcs.v2.json file would then ship beside this one.

generated_at.description: Optional ISO-8601 timestamp recorded when the file was last written.

arcs.description: User-declared closure-contract arcs. Each item declares the 5-tuple that closes one feedback loop.

id.description: Arc identifier. Same character class as the workspace registry name (workspaces.v1.json) so arc ids round-trip safely through git refs, file paths, and JSONL keys. Must be unique within this file.

description.description: Optional human-readable summary of what this arc closes.

plant_surfaces.description: Free-form URIs naming the externally observable state this arc controls (fs://path, supabase://project.table, gh://owner/repo/pulls, http://service, etc). Informational — not parsed; the sensor decides how to read them.

sensor.description: How the arc observes the plant. Output of the sensor is what termination evaluates against.

kind.description: exit_code: shell script exit status; json_path: jq-style path against script stdout; log_match: regex against a log file; metric_threshold: numeric reading from a metric source.

source.description: Sensor source — typically a script path (for exit_code/json_path), a log file path (for log_match), or a metric URI (for metric_threshold).

expr.description: Optional sensor expression — jq path for json_path, regex for log_match, comparison expression for metric_threshold.

actuator.description: How the arc acts on the plant. Default Π is agent_reasoning (the agent itself is the controller); script/mcp_tool/http actuators bind specific mechanisms.

kind.description: agent_reasoning: the agent loop is the controller (default Π binding); script: shell-out; mcp_tool: MCP server invocation; http: REST/webhook actuator.

tools.description: Tool allowlist for agent_reasoning actuators, or argv/endpoint hints for script/mcp_tool/http.

target.description: Optional actuator target — script path, MCP tool name, or HTTP endpoint.

termination.description: When the arc closes (verdict transitions from running to green/red).

kind.description: predicate: boolean expression over sensor output; wallclock: time-bounded (use with tau_a); score_threshold: numeric comparison; exit_zero: sensor exit_code == 0.

expr.description: Termination expression. Form depends on kind — boolean for predicate, comparison for score_threshold, ignored for exit_zero (kept for human readers).

tau_a.description: Termination window in seconds — the upper bound on how long this arc may run before forced verdict. Mirrors tau_a in rcs-parameters.toml (switching cost denominator).

shield_ref.description: Optional path/anchor to the policy.yaml gate that supervises this arc (e.g. 'gates.hard.G-PR-MERGE'). Informational — read by doctor §20.
